name: codex-master
description: Local Codex Masterjet plugin for controlling isolated Agentinnen A/B through a data-sparse tmux MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control isolated Codex Agentinnen with a local Masterjet MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds the codex-master-mcp local MCP server plus fleet-management skills for starting, assigning, auditing, and safely inspecting two isolated Codex Agentinnen through tmux. The tool surface is data-sparse by default and keeps prompt text, Agentin responses, and raw terminal logs out of normal MCP responses.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Master to start Agentin A and Agentin B
Assign a read-only Exploriererin task with codex-master-mcp
Check codex-master plugin and MCP status
